meaning: 马拉开波湾(即委内瑞拉湾 ;马拉开波湖[委内瑞拉西北部]
examples: He also raided the coastline of Venezuela around the Lake Maracaibo.
Another multiple airlines to fly to Maracaibo, please telephone!
Oil and duckweed algae coat Lake Maracaibo, a 13, 000-square-kilometer salt lake.
Last year Mr Rosales was elected mayor of Venezuela's second biggest city, Maracaibo.
In April 2009, he stepped down as Mayor of Maracaibo when he was charged with corruption in Venezuela and fled to Peru.
